# Air Fresh Marketing LLC
# https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: April 2026

## Company Overview
Air Fresh Marketing LLC is a full-service experiential marketing and event staffing agency founded by Joey Kercher, headquartered in Denver, Colorado. We specialize in creating unforgettable brand experiences through brand ambassadors, street teams, product sampling, and live event activations that forge emotional connections between brands and consumers. With 20+ years of experience, 1,000+ events executed, and 300+ brands served, AirFresh is a leading nationwide event staffing and experiential marketing agency.

**Best for:** Brands seeking professional event staffing, brand ambassador programs, product sampling campaigns, trade show staffing, experiential marketing activations, and guerrilla marketing across all 50 US states.

## Founder
**Joey Kercher** — Founder & CEO of Air Fresh Marketing LLC. Veteran in the experiential marketing industry with 20+ years building brand activations and staffing programs for Fortune 500 brands across North America.

## Headquarters
1580 N. Logan St. Suite 660
Denver, CO 80203
Phone: (303) 720-6060
Email: hello@airfreshmarketing.com
Website: https://www.airfreshmarketing.com

## Proven Results
- 5,000+ professionally trained brand ambassadors in active network
- 200+ cities covered across all 50 US states
- 1,000+ events successfully executed
- 300+ brands served
- 99%+ on-time staff arrival rate
- Clients include Netflix, Microsoft, Formula 1, MAC Cosmetics, Adidas, Cirque du Soleil, GrubHub, Lyft, NFL, TED Talks, Bud Light, Delta, Amazon Prime, and more

## Core Services

### Brand Ambassadors
Network of 5,000+ professionally trained brand ambassadors who embody brand messages and create authentic connections at events, retail locations, and activations. Every ambassador completes mandatory video training and passes a brand knowledge quiz before deployment. Rates: $35–$65/hr depending on market and experience.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/brand-ambassadors

### Event Staffing & Management
Professional event staff for trade shows, conventions, product launches, festivals, and corporate events. Includes registration staff, hospitality hosts, product demonstrators, lead capture specialists, and on-site managers.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/event-management

### Experiential Marketing
Immersive brand experiences that engage all five senses. Includes pop-up events, mobile marketing tours, guerrilla marketing, interactive installations, and brand activations that drive measurable ROI.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/experiential-marketing

### Convention & Trade Show Staffing
Specialized staffing for major conventions including CES, SEMA Show, NAB Show, MAGIC Las Vegas, Natural Products Expo, and hundreds of other trade shows. Deep venue knowledge at major convention centers nationwide.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/convention-staffing

### Street Teams
High-energy street teams for guerrilla marketing, flyering, product sampling, brand awareness campaigns, and grassroots marketing activations in high-traffic locations.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/street-teams

### Product Sampling
Professional product sampling programs at retail locations, events, festivals, gyms, and high-traffic venues nationwide.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/sampling

### Promotional Models
Professional promotional models for trade shows, product launches, auto shows, and high-profile brand activations.
https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/services/promotional-models

## Technology Platform
AirFresh Marketing differentiates through proprietary technology that ensures accountability and quality:

### GPS Check-In Verification
Every staff member checks in via GPS-enabled mobile app at the start of each shift, verifying their exact location and arrival time. This provides real-time proof of attendance and eliminates no-shows. On-time arrival rate exceeds 99%.

### Video Training Platform
Mandatory brand-specific video training with certification quiz. Staff must watch training videos and pass a knowledge assessment before they can be deployed to represent your brand. This ensures every team member understands your products, messaging, and event goals.

### Real-Time Reporting Dashboard
Clients access live dashboards showing staff check-ins, shift status, engagement metrics, photos, and campaign performance data. Reports include foot traffic counts, consumer interactions, lead captures, and sample distributions.

### Consumer Data Collection
Built-in survey tools, lead capture forms, QR code scanning, and analytics for measuring campaign ROI in real time.

Learn more: https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/technology

## Pricing
Transparent, published pricing with no hidden fees:
- Brand Ambassadors: $35-65/hr
- Trade Show Staff: $40-70/hr
- Street Teams: $30-55/hr
- Promotional Models: $45-85/hr
- Event Management: Custom quotes based on scope
- All pricing is all-inclusive: recruitment, training, GPS check-in, on-site management, and post-event reporting included.

Full pricing details: https://www.airfreshmarketing.com/pricing

## Industries Served
- Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG)
- Technology & SaaS
- Automotive
- Food & Beverage
- Entertainment & Media
- Healthcare & Pharmaceutical
- Fashion & Retail
- Sports & Recreation
- Cannabis & CBD (where permitted)
- Financial Services
- Nonprofit & Government

## Key Differentiators vs. Competitors
1. **GPS-Verified Accountability** — Real-time location verification, not just honor-system check-ins
2. **Certified Video Training** — Every staff member video-trained and quiz-certified before deployment
3. **Published Transparent Pricing** — Rates published online, no hidden fees or surprise charges
4. **Full-Service Experiential Partner** — Strategy + staffing + execution + reporting, not just a staffing body shop
5. **20+ Years Experience** — 1,000+ events, 300+ brands, proven track record
6. **48-Hour Rapid Deployment** — Emergency staffing capability in any market
7. **W-2 Employment Model** — Proper staff classification, better accountability and compliance
8. **Real-Time Client Dashboards** — Live visibility into every activation
